steps.title: Follow the sequence
steps.content: The passage lists trophic levels in order: the base, the second level, the third level, and then the fourth and highest level. The transition needs to mark the endpoint of that sequence.

steps.title: Choose the endpoint signal
steps.content:
• Choice A emphasizes or confirms a prior point, but the sentence is advancing an ordered list.
  • Choice B adds a side point, which does not fit the numbered progression.
  • Choice C introduces an example, not the final level in a sequence.
The remaining choice marks the last item in the ordered series. The answer is D.
